query:
SELECT w.id, w.name, w.email, COUNT(c.id) as customer_count 
FROM workers w 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.fieldManager = w.id 
WHERE w.name != 'Admin User'
GROUP BY w.id, w.name, w.email
ORDER BY customer_count DESC;
